prompt: Based on the clear single-person portrait reference image I uploaded, create a set of 8 'freediving underwater dream art portraits', all in 3:4 vertical composition, as independent images. 1 | Character Consistency: Must strictly preserve the original facial features, face shape, eyes, nose, lips, skin color, hairline, age, and overall identity of the reference person. No face swapping, no turning into a stranger, no 'influencer face', no anime style, no plastic-looking face. Skin should retain realistic texture and a high-end photographic feel; body proportions must be realistic and natural with slender limbs and correct lines for neck, back, waist, hips, legs, and feet. 2 | Overall Style: High-budget, realistic, professional, dreamy, ethereal, and breathtaking freediving underwater art masterpiece. Combines a high-fashion editorial feel with documentary-level ocean realism. Emphasize freediving professionalism, body control, buoyancy, and the coexistence of strength and elegance. Not an ordinary tourist photo, not cheap mermaid cosplay, not low-quality boudoir style. 3 | Professional Freediving Gear: Must feature professional freediving equipment, including: low-volume freediving mask, long carbon fiber fins, slim weight belt, dive computer, and minimal use of a nose clip if needed. No oxygen tanks, BCDs, or scuba gear; the set must be clearly identified as freediving. 4 | Clothing and Styling: High-end backless and high-cut freediving fashion styling, balancing professionalism, fashion, and luxury. Includes: backless one-piece high-cut swimsuits, fitted fashion dive wear, in colors like obsidian black, pearl white, sea salt gray, mist blue, deep sea blue, pale gold, or cool gray. Minimal use of floating veils or ribbons is allowed but must not be distracting. Must look like international fashion underwater photography, not cheap swimwear or e-commerce style. 5 | Scene and Marine Life: Clear, realistic, and magnificent underwater world. Water in deep blue, turquoise, or cyan with realistic sunbeams, particles, light refraction, and spatial depth. Backgrounds include sand patterns, reefs, coral, trenches, and open deep sea. Marine life should be realistic and elegant, focusing on: dancing with sharks (reef, lemon, or nurse sharks), bait balls/fish vortexes, and optionally sea turtles, rays, or tropical fish. No deformed creatures or aquarium-like fake settings. 6 | Action and Camera Requirements: Professional freediving movements: diving, hovering, gliding, rotating, stretching, and ascending. Varied camera angles and shots: top-down, low-angle, side-view, front, close-up, medium, wide, ultra-wide, backlit, and sub-surface perspectives. 7 | Mood and Temperament: Quiet, focused, brave, dreamy, elegant, and mysterious. Expressions should be calm and immersive, not necessarily looking at the camera. 8 | Negative Requirements: No AI look, no plastic skin, no extra limbs, no deformed hands or feet, no incorrect body structures, no wrong fin structures, no scuba gear, no low-quality filters, no watermarks. 01 | Sub-surface descent opening; 02 | Lateral glide through coral; 03 | Dancing with sharks (wide shot); 04 | Dancing with sharks (medium shot relationship); 05 | Fish storm vortex (top-down); 06 | Close-up backlit portrait; 07 | Ascending toward the light; 08 | Deep sea dream finale (wide master shot).
